title: Historical Packet 058 And Packet 059 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate
historical_note: This packet records one bounded Olares Phase 5 authority-publication and host-mirror resync-gate slice from before the canonical repo boundary moved to `C:/APEX Platform/apex-power-ops-platform` on 2026-05-07. It remains packet-history provenance, not a live execution instruction for current repo operations.

use this packet JSON only when historical provenance is needed for the earlier `olares-phase-5-060` authority-publication and host-mirror resync-gate slice
objective: Publish the local Packet 058 closure authority and Packet 059 planning authority through the parent-root boundary, then resynchronize `/home/olares/code/apex` to the resulting commit without treating authority publication as parallel source/test execution authority or migration approval.
active_role: Olares Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Operator
dependency_note: Packet 059 concluded the first safe pilot is coordinator-owned governance/publication plus at most one mutation worker, and selected authority publication/resync as the next move before any later parallel execution decision opens.
required_inputs: Current Packet 058 closure handoff and Packet 058 JSON completion state
Current Packet 059 planning handoff and Packet 059 JSON completion state
Current Packet 060 draft, routing handoff, and roadmap updates
Current `/home/olares/code/apex` branch, commit, remote, and cleanliness at `d8e5f02fb0ea1b73cc573c855ea3d5562aa2314c`

constrained_outputs: A bounded parent-root publication commit and push containing only Packet 058 closure authority, Packet 059 planning authority, Packet 060 draft authority, routing, and roadmap updates needed for this gate

A host mirror resync record proving `/home/olares/code/apex` reached clean parity with the published commit without force/reset/clean, remote rewrite, runtime/service mutation, package mutation, install, source edits, or old-clone mutation
A publication and host-mirror resync handoff recording staged scope, commit hash, push result, host pre/post state, excluded drift, and the next decision candidate
validation_steps: Reconfirm parent-root status and distinguish Packet 058/059 closure authority from unrelated `.vercelignore` and older Packet 039 drift.
Reconfirm source files, package files, and lockfiles remain clean and outside the publication scope.
Reconfirm `/home/olares/code/apex` is clean at `d8e5f02fb0ea1b73cc573c855ea3d5562aa2314c` before publication.
Reconfirm `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` branch, commit, and status count without mutation.
Stage only Packet 058 closure authority, Packet 059 planning authority, Packet 060 draft authority, routing, and roadmap updates required by this gate.
Run `git diff --cached --check` and inspect staged path scope before committing.
Commit and push the bounded authority publication only if staged scope is exact.
Fast-forward `/home/olares/code/apex` to the published commit only if it can be done non-destructively.

Do not open any parallel source/test execution lane, approve migration, mutate runtime or services, mutate packages or lockfiles, install dependencies, rewrite remotes, expand AI-services, change Gitea/code-hosting, change canonical-hosting, roll back, force/reset/clean, or mutate `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes no database writes and no source edits, runtime mutation, service mutation, package mutation, lockfile mutation, install, package-manager activation/download, remote rewrite, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, migration approval, rollback, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation. It authorizes only bounded authority publication and non-destructive `/home/olares/code/apex` mirror resync.
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-04. Packet 060 published Packet 058 closure authority, Packet 059 planning authority, Packet 060 draft authority, routing, and roadmap through commit `500f2d21bcb2be542e37e66121fdd0d04e4b7639`, pushed `origin/clean-main`, and fast-forwarded `/home/olares/code/apex` from clean `d8e5f02fb0ea1b73cc573c855ea3d5562aa2314c` to clean parity at `500f2d21bcb2be542e37e66121fdd0d04e4b7639`. `.vercelignore`, older Packet 039 drift, and Packet 057 post-publication local closure drift were excluded. `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform` was observed only and remained at `2836a2622309b4e146ca24f23b5bf87312c0c857` with status count 30.
next_action: Any later parallel execution decision must be opened as a separate bounded packet. Packet 060 does not authorize parallel source/test execution, migration, source edits, package/toolchain repair, runtime/service mutation, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, remote rewrite, rollback, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation.
